tests.name: extension/pipeline/treesitter/javaSourceInfo reads package names from scoped and plain identifiers
extension/pipeline/treesitter/javaSourceInfo returns null when no package declaration exists
extension/pipeline/treesitter/javaSourceInfo resolves the source root from the detected package name
